title: wormia scabrella
intro: Wormia scabrella, also known as "Kutaja" or "Himalayan Kutaja", is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, known for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Wormia scabrella are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Wormia scabrella can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
